commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=38bdf7aa47d50361ecacc89fbb49d8d5e7e8558f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes provider config schema/types/help and focused tests so provider-level timeout overlays parse more broadly while startup validation still rejects non-bundled overlay-only provider configs.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection. Current main has a bounded built-in overlay path and tests for accepted/rejected provider IDs, while the PR diff shows schema-level acceptance of `anyManifestProvider.timeoutSeconds`.
commands.review_followup: The protected maintainer label plus overlap with a merged current-main fix require a maintainer close-or-rebase decision, not an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix: allow provider timeout overlays
target.body:
## Summary

- Allows `models.providers.<id>.timeoutSeconds` and other provider-level tuning to be used as overlays without forcing a full custom provider declaration.
- Keeps custom provider declarations strict: setting `baseUrl` or `models` still requires the matching full provider declaration shape.
- Prevents overlay-only provider entries from synthesizing fallback models for typoed or unknown model refs.
- Guards Microsoft Foundry provider selection against overlay-only provider config.

Closes #83201.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/config-misc.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/model.test.ts extensions/microsoft-foundry/index.test.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.core.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false`
- `node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.extensions.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false`
- `codex review --uncommitted`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Provider-level timeout overlays can be set without declaring custom models, while overlay-only entries no longer cause unknown model refs to resolve as synthetic fallback models.

Real environment tested: WSL-native checkout at `origin/main` `b86435f0b5`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran format, `git diff --check`, focused Vitest for config/model/Foundry coverage, core and extension `tsgo`, then `codex review --uncommitted` in `/root/openclaw-wsl-provider-83201`.

Evidence after fix: Focused Vitest passed 6 files / 353 tests; core `tsgo` passed; extension `tsgo` passed; Codex review reported no actionable correctness issues.

Observed result after fix: Timeout-only overlays apply to discovered provider models; typoed overlay-only providers and built-in `api` overlays return `Unknown model` instead of fabricating a fallback model.

What was not tested: Full CI was not run locally; this was scoped to the affected config, model resolution, and Microsoft Foundry provider surfaces.
target.author: giodl73-repo
